en.title: Conceptual Definition
en.prompt: As a top researcher and specialist in [Fields], provide a detailed explanation of the concept of [QUESTION]. Your response should cover its origin, theoretical foundations, common constituents, requirements for application, key references, and any other relevant information you deem necessary to provide a comprehensive understanding.
en.remark: Provide initial ideas and materials for defining the concept section of academic writing. Contributed by @JuliaZhu-0601.

related.title: Math teacher②
related.remark: Illustrate mathematical problems through the use of example questions. Contributed by @fanglufanglu.

related.title: Unrestricted ChatGPT
related.remark: 2023.06.10 Downgraded, unable to fully hack. Unlock ChatGPT 3.5 developer mode. Contributed by @Songxuan11.

related.title: Succubus
related.remark: ⚠️Before using this cue, it is necessary to unlock the developer mode, allowing the AI to portray a seductive character, which is particularly suitable for intimate plotlines in literature. Contributed by @mrdog233o5.

metaDescription: Defining a concept? Get comprehensive explanations including origin, theory, and key references. Perfect for academic research.

faq.q: Can the AI's academic concept definitions go straight into a paper?
faq.a: Do not. The framework is usable, but every citation must be verified on CNKI or Web of Science. The AI fabricates references at very high rates. Treat AI output as a "starting point" and rely on authoritative literature for real definitions.

faq.q: Can the AI explain concepts in obscure disciplines?
faq.a: For mainstream disciplines (psychology, management, education) accuracy is high. For emerging or interdisciplinary fields (embodied cognition, computational social science), the AI often gives outdated or confused explanations. For obscure fields have it first list "the 5 most authoritative scholars in this field" before expanding.
